title: Yoga Tattva Upanishad: The Reality of Yoga
description: From the Yoga Tattva Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Yoga Tattva Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: I shall now describe the eight limbs of yoga: yama (restraint), niyama (observance), asana (posture), pranayama (breath control), pratyahara (sense withdrawal), dharana (concentration), dhyana (meditation), samadhi (absorption).
